corrections.note: Printed text has δὲ, not διʼ, and dative ἐπιστήμῃ, not ἐπιστήμην.
Verse number should be XI 1 in apparatus, but body line itself is correct; no body correction needed here.

corrections.correct: την ψυχην] την τιμὴν ℵ* (-μην ℵ¹)
corrections.note: Apparatus reads την τιμὴν for ℵ*; transcript dropped την and expanded only partially.
Lemma is την ψυχην, not split with dative ψυχῃ.
Lemma in apparatus is ἐπιστημῃ δὲ, and variant is ἐπιστημῃ.

corrections.current:
ὁ
δοξαζομενος] om δε ℵcδοξαζομενος AC
corrections.correct: ὁ δοξαζομενος] om δε ℵ | ὁ ἄδοξος δοξαζομενος AC
corrections.note: Transcript collapsed line and omitted separator; printed apparatus has om δε ℵ, then separate reading ὁ ἄδοξος δοξαζομενος AC.

corrections.current:
XI 1 ανυψωσε] ℵcA ανυψωσαι C | κεφαλην] +αυτου
ℵAC | καθιση ℵ* (-σι ℵc.a(vid) -σει ℵc.c) C καθησει A
corrections.correct: XI 1 ἀνύψωσεν] ℵcA ἀνυψῶσαι C | κεφαλην] + αὐτοῦ ℵAC | καθίσει ℵ* (-σι ℵc.a(vid) -σει ℵc.c) C καθησει A
corrections.note: Lemma is ἀνύψωσεν and καθίσει; transcript has wrong forms ανυψωσε and καθιση.

uncertain.note: Transcript shows Arabic numeral I before σοφία; image shows chapter marker/verse layout with left-margin 1 and right-side XI. Not treated as error because edition transcription conventions may preserve this.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct, but Sir. 10:30 has substantive errors. Apparatus contains several line-break and lemma misreadings, especially at 10:28-31 and 11:1. Removed spurious body accent correction from consideration except noted as uncertain formatting issue.
